<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Vonage\Insights; trait CnamTrait { public function getCallerName(): ?string { return $this->data['caller_name'] ?? null; } public function getFirstName(): ?string { return $this->data['first_name'] ?? null; } public function getLastName(): ?string { return $this->data['last_name'] ?? null; } public function getCallerType(): ?string { return $this->data['caller_type'] ?? null; } }
